title: Add demo script and cast to images
body:
Add a pointer to the script and asciinema cast for the
images command to the commands.md file.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Green tests and a one line touch up of a doc file.  Can I get a LGTM or two?
